enonce.texte: Instructions: Match the complaint vocabulary with their definitions.

questions.texte: Match the following terms:

sousQuestions.texte: a. The work done by a company to satisfy customers
c. A person who buys goods or services
d. Money returned to a customer

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Complete the complaint letter with the correct words from the box.

Words: complaint, service, quality, refund, customer, manager, apology, resolution

questions.texte: Read the letter and fill in the blanks:
questions.reponse: 1. complaint, 2. service, 3. quality, 4. refund, 5. manager, 6. apology, 7. resolution

sousQuestions.texte:
Dear ________ (1),

I am writing to express my ________ (2) about the poor ________ (3) I received at your shop. The ________ (4) of the product was not satisfactory. I would like to request a full ________ (5).

I hope you will take this matter seriously. I expect a proper ________ (6) and an ________ (7) for this inconvenience.

Yours faithfully,
John Ndi
sousQuestions.reponse: 1. manager, 2. complaint, 3. service, 4. quality, 5. refund, 6. resolution, 7. apology

enonce.texte: Instructions: Put the verbs in brackets into the correct tense.

questions.texte: I (to buy) ________ a new phone last week, but it (to stop) ________ working yesterday.
questions.reponse: bought / stopped

questions.texte: She (to work) ________ at this company for five years before she (to resign) ________.
questions.reponse: had worked / resigned

questions.texte: I (to wait) ________ for the bus for 30 minutes when it finally (to arrive) ________.
questions.reponse: had been waiting / arrived

questions.texte: They (to complain) ________ about the service every time they (to come) ________ here.
questions.reponse: complain / come

questions.texte: I (to send) ________ an email to the company manager tomorrow.
questions.reponse: will send

enonce.texte: Instructions: Rewrite the sentences in the passive voice.

questions.texte: The company delivered the package late.
questions.reponse: The package was delivered late (by the company).

questions.texte: The manager has received the complaint letter.
questions.reponse: The complaint letter has been received by the manager.

questions.texte: The customer will write a review about the service.
questions.reponse: A review about the service will be written by the customer.

questions.texte: They offered a refund to the dissatisfied customer.
questions.reponse: A refund was offered to the dissatisfied customer.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read the letter of complaint below and answer the questions.

"Dear Customer Service Manager,

I am writing to complain about the poor internet service I have been receiving from your company for the past three weeks. I subscribed to your premium package, but the connection has been very slow and often disconnects. I have contacted your support team four times, but no one has resolved my problem. I am paying a lot of money for a service that does not work properly.

I would like a full refund for the last month or a reduction in my bill. If this issue is not resolved within one week, I will cancel my subscription and report your company to the consumer protection agency.

I hope you will take this complaint seriously and act quickly.

Yours sincerely,
Marie Fouda"

questions.texte: What is the main reason for Marie's complaint?
questions.reponse: She is complaining about poor internet service (slow connection and frequent disconnections).

questions.texte: What action has Marie already taken?
questions.reponse: She has contacted the support team four times.

questions.texte: What does Marie request from the company?
questions.reponse: She wants a full refund for the last month or a reduction in her bill.

questions.texte: What will Marie do if the issue is not resolved?
questions.reponse: She will cancel her subscription and report the company to the consumer protection agency.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Write a short email (8-10 sentences) to complain about a service quality issue. Use the following situation.

Situation: You ordered food from a restaurant through a delivery app. The food arrived 45 minutes late and was cold. One item was missing from your order.

Include the following in your email:
- The problem you experienced
- What you want the restaurant to do
- A deadline for action

questions.texte: Write your complaint email here.
questions.reponse: Students' answers will vary. Example: "Dear Manager, I am writing to complain about the poor service I received from your restaurant today. I ordered food through your delivery app at 1:00 pm. The food arrived at 1:45 pm, which was 45 minutes late. When I opened the package, the food was cold. Also, the chicken dish I ordered was missing. I paid for a full meal but did not receive it. I would like a full refund for the missing item and compensation for the cold food. Please respond to this email within 48 hours. If I do not receive a satisfactory response, I will leave a negative review on social media. Yours sincerely, [Your Name]"

sousQuestions.texte: List the key elements you included in your complaint email.
sousQuestions.reponse: Students should identify: problem description (late delivery, cold food, missing item), request (refund/compensation), and deadline for action.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Write a short tweet (max 280 characters) to complain about a poor service experience. Use the situation below.

Situation: You went to a mobile phone shop to repair your phone. The repair took 5 days (instead of 2 days) and the phone is still not working properly.

questions.texte: Write your complaint tweet here.
questions.reponse: Students' answers will vary. Example: "@PhoneShop I brought my phone for repair 5 days ago. I was told it would take 2 days but it's still not working! This is unacceptable service! #badservice #customerservice"

sousQuestions.texte: Is your tweet within the character limit? Count the characters.
sousQuestions.reponse: Students should verify their tweet is 280 characters or less.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct conditional form.

questions.texte: If the company ________ (improve) its service, customers ________ (be) more satisfied.
questions.reponse: improves / will be (Type 1)

questions.texte: If I ________ (know) the service was so poor, I ________ (never subscribe).
questions.reponse: had known / would never have subscribed (Type 3)

questions.texte: If they ________ (respond) to my complaint faster, I ________ (not write) this negative review.
questions.reponse: had responded / would not have written (Type 3)

questions.texte: If you ________ (call) the customer service, they ________ (help) you.
questions.reponse: call / will help (Type 1)

enonce.texte: Instructions: Change the direct speech into reported speech.

questions.texte: "I am not satisfied with this service," the customer said.
questions.reponse: The customer said that he/she was not satisfied with that service.

questions.texte: "We will give you a refund," the manager promised.
questions.reponse: The manager promised that they would give me/us a refund.

questions.texte: "Have you received the package?" she asked me.
questions.reponse: She asked me if I had received the package.

questions.texte: "Please call the customer service," the employee told me.
questions.reponse: The employee told me to call the customer service.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Complete the dialogue between a customer and a customer service representative.

questions.texte: Read the dialogue and fill in the blanks with appropriate sentences.
questions.reponse: Students' answers will vary. Example: "Rep: Good morning! How can I help you? Customer: I would like to make a complaint about the internet service. Rep: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you explain the problem? Customer: The connection has been very slow for the past two weeks. Rep: I understand. Have you contacted our technical support? Customer: Yes, I have called four times, but no one has solved the problem. Rep: I apologize for the inconvenience. I will escalate this issue to our technical team. Customer: Thank you. I would like a refund for the last month since the service has been so bad. Rep: I will process your request. You will receive a response within 24 hours."

sousQuestions.texte: What phrases did you use to express the complaint?
sousQuestions.reponse: Students should identify phrases like 'I would like to make a complaint', 'The connection has been very slow', 'I would like a refund'.

sousQuestions.texte: What phrases did you use to apologize or offer help?
sousQuestions.reponse: Students should identify phrases like 'I'm sorry to hear that', 'I apologize for the inconvenience', 'I will escalate this issue'.
